targets.rawQueryText: WITH place_events AS (SELECT searched_at, keyword, 'authenticated' AS actor FROM place_search_history UNION ALL SELECT searched_at, keyword, 'anonymous' AS actor FROM anonymous_place_search_history) SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM place_events WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', searched_at) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from}/1000 AND ${__to}/1000 AND ('${BI_ACTOR:value}' = 'all' OR actor = '${BI_ACTOR:value}');
targets.queryText: WITH place_events AS (SELECT searched_at, keyword, 'authenticated' AS actor FROM place_search_history UNION ALL SELECT searched_at, keyword, 'anonymous' AS actor FROM anonymous_place_search_history) SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM place_events WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', searched_at) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from}/1000 AND ${__to}/1000 AND ('${BI_ACTOR:value}' = 'all' OR actor = '${BI_ACTOR:value}');

targets.rawQueryText: WITH route_events AS (SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'authenticated' AS actor FROM route_search_history UNION ALL SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'anonymous' AS actor FROM anonymous_route_search_history) SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM route_events WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', searched_at) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from}/1000 AND ${__to}/1000 AND ('${BI_ACTOR:value}' = 'all' OR actor = '${BI_ACTOR:value}') AND ('${BI_SITE:value}' = 'all' OR site_id = '${BI_SITE:value}') AND ('${BI_DIRECTION:value}' = 'all' OR direction = '${BI_DIRECTION:value}') AND ('${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}' = 'all' OR day_type = '${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}') AND ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all' OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'filtered' AND selected_endpoints_json <> '[]') OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all_selected' AND selected_endpoints_json = '[]'));
targets.queryText: WITH route_events AS (SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'authenticated' AS actor FROM route_search_history UNION ALL SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'anonymous' AS actor FROM anonymous_route_search_history) SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM route_events WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', searched_at) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from}/1000 AND ${__to}/1000 AND ('${BI_ACTOR:value}' = 'all' OR actor = '${BI_ACTOR:value}') AND ('${BI_SITE:value}' = 'all' OR site_id = '${BI_SITE:value}') AND ('${BI_DIRECTION:value}' = 'all' OR direction = '${BI_DIRECTION:value}') AND ('${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}' = 'all' OR day_type = '${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}') AND ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all' OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'filtered' AND selected_endpoints_json <> '[]') OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all_selected' AND selected_endpoints_json = '[]'));

targets.rawQueryText: WITH route_events AS (SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'authenticated' AS actor FROM route_search_history UNION ALL SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'anonymous' AS actor FROM anonymous_route_search_history) SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN actor = 'authenticated' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) END AS value FROM route_events WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', searched_at) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from}/1000 AND ${__to}/1000 AND ('${BI_SITE:value}' = 'all' OR site_id = '${BI_SITE:value}') AND ('${BI_DIRECTION:value}' = 'all' OR direction = '${BI_DIRECTION:value}') AND ('${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}' = 'all' OR day_type = '${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}') AND ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all' OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'filtered' AND selected_endpoints_json <> '[]') OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all_selected' AND selected_endpoints_json = '[]'));
targets.queryText: WITH route_events AS (SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'authenticated' AS actor FROM route_search_history UNION ALL SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'anonymous' AS actor FROM anonymous_route_search_history) SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN actor = 'authenticated' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) END AS value FROM route_events WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', searched_at) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from}/1000 AND ${__to}/1000 AND ('${BI_SITE:value}' = 'all' OR site_id = '${BI_SITE:value}') AND ('${BI_DIRECTION:value}' = 'all' OR direction = '${BI_DIRECTION:value}') AND ('${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}' = 'all' OR day_type = '${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}') AND ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all' OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'filtered' AND selected_endpoints_json <> '[]') OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all_selected' AND selected_endpoints_json = '[]'));

targets.rawQueryText: WITH route_events AS (SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'authenticated' AS actor FROM route_search_history UNION ALL SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'anonymous' AS actor FROM anonymous_route_search_history) SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN selected_endpoints_json <> '[]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) END AS value FROM route_events WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', searched_at) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from}/1000 AND ${__to}/1000 AND ('${BI_ACTOR:value}' = 'all' OR actor = '${BI_ACTOR:value}') AND ('${BI_SITE:value}' = 'all' OR site_id = '${BI_SITE:value}') AND ('${BI_DIRECTION:value}' = 'all' OR direction = '${BI_DIRECTION:value}') AND ('${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}' = 'all' OR day_type = '${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}');
targets.queryText: WITH route_events AS (SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'authenticated' AS actor FROM route_search_history UNION ALL SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'anonymous' AS actor FROM anonymous_route_search_history) SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN selected_endpoints_json <> '[]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) END AS value FROM route_events WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', searched_at) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from}/1000 AND ${__to}/1000 AND ('${BI_ACTOR:value}' = 'all' OR actor = '${BI_ACTOR:value}') AND ('${BI_SITE:value}' = 'all' OR site_id = '${BI_SITE:value}') AND ('${BI_DIRECTION:value}' = 'all' OR direction = '${BI_DIRECTION:value}') AND ('${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}' = 'all' OR day_type = '${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}');

targets.rawQueryText: WITH place_events AS (SELECT searched_at, keyword, 'authenticated' AS actor FROM place_search_history UNION ALL SELECT searched_at, keyword, 'anonymous' AS actor FROM anonymous_place_search_history) SELECT keyword AS keyword, COUNT(*) AS searches FROM place_events WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', searched_at) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from}/1000 AND ${__to}/1000 AND ('${BI_ACTOR:value}' = 'all' OR actor = '${BI_ACTOR:value}') GROUP BY keyword ORDER BY searches DESC, keyword ASC LIMIT 20;
targets.queryText: WITH place_events AS (SELECT searched_at, keyword, 'authenticated' AS actor FROM place_search_history UNION ALL SELECT searched_at, keyword, 'anonymous' AS actor FROM anonymous_place_search_history) SELECT keyword AS keyword, COUNT(*) AS searches FROM place_events WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', searched_at) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from}/1000 AND ${__to}/1000 AND ('${BI_ACTOR:value}' = 'all' OR actor = '${BI_ACTOR:value}') GROUP BY keyword ORDER BY searches DESC, keyword ASC LIMIT 20;

targets.rawQueryText: WITH route_events AS (SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'authenticated' AS actor FROM route_search_history UNION ALL SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'anonymous' AS actor FROM anonymous_route_search_history) SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(place_name, ''), '선택한 위치') AS place_name, COUNT(*) AS searches FROM route_events WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', searched_at) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from}/1000 AND ${__to}/1000 AND ('${BI_ACTOR:value}' = 'all' OR actor = '${BI_ACTOR:value}') AND ('${BI_SITE:value}' = 'all' OR site_id = '${BI_SITE:value}') AND ('${BI_DIRECTION:value}' = 'all' OR direction = '${BI_DIRECTION:value}') AND ('${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}' = 'all' OR day_type = '${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}') AND ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all' OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'filtered' AND selected_endpoints_json <> '[]') OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all_selected' AND selected_endpoints_json = '[]')) GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(place_name, ''), '선택한 위치') ORDER BY searches DESC, place_name ASC LIMIT 20;
targets.queryText: WITH route_events AS (SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'authenticated' AS actor FROM route_search_history UNION ALL SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'anonymous' AS actor FROM anonymous_route_search_history) SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(place_name, ''), '선택한 위치') AS place_name, COUNT(*) AS searches FROM route_events WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', searched_at) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from}/1000 AND ${__to}/1000 AND ('${BI_ACTOR:value}' = 'all' OR actor = '${BI_ACTOR:value}') AND ('${BI_SITE:value}' = 'all' OR site_id = '${BI_SITE:value}') AND ('${BI_DIRECTION:value}' = 'all' OR direction = '${BI_DIRECTION:value}') AND ('${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}' = 'all' OR day_type = '${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}') AND ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all' OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'filtered' AND selected_endpoints_json <> '[]') OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all_selected' AND selected_endpoints_json = '[]')) GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(place_name, ''), '선택한 위치') ORDER BY searches DESC, place_name ASC LIMIT 20;

targets.rawQueryText: WITH route_events AS (SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'authenticated' AS actor FROM route_search_history UNION ALL SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'anonymous' AS actor FROM anonymous_route_search_history) SELECT CASE site_id WHEN '0000011' THEN '삼성전자(기흥/화성)' WHEN '0000012' THEN '삼성전자(온양/천안)' WHEN '0000013' THEN '삼성전자(수원)' WHEN '0000015' THEN '삼성디스플레이(아산)' WHEN '0000017' THEN '삼성SDI(천안)' WHEN '0000027' THEN '삼성전자(구미)' WHEN '0000028' THEN '삼성전자(광주)' WHEN '0000041' THEN '삼성전자(우면/서울대)' WHEN '0000042' THEN '삼성전자(평택)' WHEN '0000069' THEN '삼성디스플레이(기흥)' ELSE '기타(' || site_id || ')' END AS site_name, direction, day_type, COUNT(*) AS searches, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN actor = 'authenticated' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS auth_ratio_pct FROM route_events WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', searched_at) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from}/1000 AND ${__to}/1000 AND ('${BI_ACTOR:value}' = 'all' OR actor = '${BI_ACTOR:value}') AND ('${BI_SITE:value}' = 'all' OR site_id = '${BI_SITE:value}') AND ('${BI_DIRECTION:value}' = 'all' OR direction = '${BI_DIRECTION:value}') AND ('${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}' = 'all' OR day_type = '${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}') AND ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all' OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'filtered' AND selected_endpoints_json <> '[]') OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all_selected' AND selected_endpoints_json = '[]')) GROUP BY site_id, direction, day_type ORDER BY searches DESC, site_name ASC LIMIT 50;
targets.queryText: WITH route_events AS (SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'authenticated' AS actor FROM route_search_history UNION ALL SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'anonymous' AS actor FROM anonymous_route_search_history) SELECT CASE site_id WHEN '0000011' THEN '삼성전자(기흥/화성)' WHEN '0000012' THEN '삼성전자(온양/천안)' WHEN '0000013' THEN '삼성전자(수원)' WHEN '0000015' THEN '삼성디스플레이(아산)' WHEN '0000017' THEN '삼성SDI(천안)' WHEN '0000027' THEN '삼성전자(구미)' WHEN '0000028' THEN '삼성전자(광주)' WHEN '0000041' THEN '삼성전자(우면/서울대)' WHEN '0000042' THEN '삼성전자(평택)' WHEN '0000069' THEN '삼성디스플레이(기흥)' ELSE '기타(' || site_id || ')' END AS site_name, direction, day_type, COUNT(*) AS searches, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN actor = 'authenticated' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS auth_ratio_pct FROM route_events WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', searched_at) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from}/1000 AND ${__to}/1000 AND ('${BI_ACTOR:value}' = 'all' OR actor = '${BI_ACTOR:value}') AND ('${BI_SITE:value}' = 'all' OR site_id = '${BI_SITE:value}') AND ('${BI_DIRECTION:value}' = 'all' OR direction = '${BI_DIRECTION:value}') AND ('${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}' = 'all' OR day_type = '${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}') AND ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all' OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'filtered' AND selected_endpoints_json <> '[]') OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all_selected' AND selected_endpoints_json = '[]')) GROUP BY site_id, direction, day_type ORDER BY searches DESC, site_name ASC LIMIT 50;

targets.rawQueryText: WITH route_events AS (SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'authenticated' AS actor FROM route_search_history UNION ALL SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'anonymous' AS actor FROM anonymous_route_search_history) SELECT ROUND(lat, 3) AS lat, ROUND(lng, 3) AS lng, COUNT(*) AS searches, COALESCE(MAX(NULLIF(place_name, '')), '선택한 위치') AS sample_place FROM route_events WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', searched_at) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from}/1000 AND ${__to}/1000 AND ('${BI_DIRECTION:value}' = 'all' OR '${BI_DIRECTION:value}' = 'depart') AND direction = 'depart' AND ('${BI_ACTOR:value}' = 'all' OR actor = '${BI_ACTOR:value}') AND ('${BI_SITE:value}' = 'all' OR site_id = '${BI_SITE:value}') AND ('${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}' = 'all' OR day_type = '${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}') AND ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all' OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'filtered' AND selected_endpoints_json <> '[]') OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all_selected' AND selected_endpoints_json = '[]')) GROUP BY ROUND(lat, 3), ROUND(lng, 3) ORDER BY searches DESC LIMIT 500;
targets.queryText: WITH route_events AS (SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'authenticated' AS actor FROM route_search_history UNION ALL SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'anonymous' AS actor FROM anonymous_route_search_history) SELECT ROUND(lat, 3) AS lat, ROUND(lng, 3) AS lng, COUNT(*) AS searches, COALESCE(MAX(NULLIF(place_name, '')), '선택한 위치') AS sample_place FROM route_events WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', searched_at) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from}/1000 AND ${__to}/1000 AND ('${BI_DIRECTION:value}' = 'all' OR '${BI_DIRECTION:value}' = 'depart') AND direction = 'depart' AND ('${BI_ACTOR:value}' = 'all' OR actor = '${BI_ACTOR:value}') AND ('${BI_SITE:value}' = 'all' OR site_id = '${BI_SITE:value}') AND ('${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}' = 'all' OR day_type = '${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}') AND ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all' OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'filtered' AND selected_endpoints_json <> '[]') OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all_selected' AND selected_endpoints_json = '[]')) GROUP BY ROUND(lat, 3), ROUND(lng, 3) ORDER BY searches DESC LIMIT 500;

targets.rawQueryText: WITH route_events AS (SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'authenticated' AS actor FROM route_search_history UNION ALL SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'anonymous' AS actor FROM anonymous_route_search_history) SELECT ROUND(lat, 3) AS lat, ROUND(lng, 3) AS lng, COUNT(*) AS searches, COALESCE(MAX(NULLIF(place_name, '')), '선택한 위치') AS sample_place FROM route_events WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', searched_at) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from}/1000 AND ${__to}/1000 AND ('${BI_DIRECTION:value}' = 'all' OR '${BI_DIRECTION:value}' = 'arrive') AND direction = 'arrive' AND ('${BI_ACTOR:value}' = 'all' OR actor = '${BI_ACTOR:value}') AND ('${BI_SITE:value}' = 'all' OR site_id = '${BI_SITE:value}') AND ('${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}' = 'all' OR day_type = '${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}') AND ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all' OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'filtered' AND selected_endpoints_json <> '[]') OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all_selected' AND selected_endpoints_json = '[]')) GROUP BY ROUND(lat, 3), ROUND(lng, 3) ORDER BY searches DESC LIMIT 500;
targets.queryText: WITH route_events AS (SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'authenticated' AS actor FROM route_search_history UNION ALL SELECT searched_at, site_id, day_type, direction, lat, lng, selected_endpoints_json, place_name, 'anonymous' AS actor FROM anonymous_route_search_history) SELECT ROUND(lat, 3) AS lat, ROUND(lng, 3) AS lng, COUNT(*) AS searches, COALESCE(MAX(NULLIF(place_name, '')), '선택한 위치') AS sample_place FROM route_events WHERE CAST(strftime('%s', searched_at) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN ${__from}/1000 AND ${__to}/1000 AND ('${BI_DIRECTION:value}' = 'all' OR '${BI_DIRECTION:value}' = 'arrive') AND direction = 'arrive' AND ('${BI_ACTOR:value}' = 'all' OR actor = '${BI_ACTOR:value}') AND ('${BI_SITE:value}' = 'all' OR site_id = '${BI_SITE:value}') AND ('${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}' = 'all' OR day_type = '${BI_DAY_TYPE:value}') AND ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all' OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'filtered' AND selected_endpoints_json <> '[]') OR ('${BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER:value}' = 'all_selected' AND selected_endpoints_json = '[]')) GROUP BY ROUND(lat, 3), ROUND(lng, 3) ORDER BY searches DESC LIMIT 500;

list.name: BI_ACTOR
list.label: 이용자 구분
list.query: 전체 : all, 로그인 : authenticated, 비로그인 : anonymous

list.name: BI_SITE
list.label: 사업장
list.query: 전체 : all, 삼성전자(기흥/화성) : 0000011, 삼성전자(온양/천안) : 0000012, 삼성전자(수원) : 0000013, 삼성디스플레이(아산) : 0000015, 삼성SDI(천안) : 0000017, 삼성전자(구미) : 0000027, 삼성전자(광주) : 0000028, 삼성전자(우면/서울대) : 0000041, 삼성전자(평택) : 0000042, 삼성디스플레이(기흥) : 0000069

list.name: BI_DIRECTION
list.label: 검색 방향
list.query: 전체 : all, 출근 : depart, 퇴근 : arrive

list.name: BI_DAY_TYPE
list.label: 운행일 구분
list.query: 전체 : all, 평일 : weekday, 토요일 : saturday, 휴일 : holiday, 일요일 : sunday

list.name: BI_ENDPOINT_FILTER
list.label: 출발/도착 옵션 필터
list.query: 전체 : all, 전체 선택 : all_selected, 옵션 좁힘 : filtered
